learning_outcomes: Use 'was' and 'were' in affirmative and negative sentences
Ask and answer questions using 'Was...?' and 'Were...?'

content.stimulus_en: We ________ at the party on Friday.

content.prompt_es: ¿'[[Weren't|no eran/estaban]]' es la contracción de 'were not'?
¿En las preguntas el verbo 'was/were' va antes que el sujeto? ([[was|era/estaba]])

content.stimulus_en: Last night there was a power cut at our house. My mother was in the kitchen. My father was in the living room. My brother was in his bedroom. It was very dark, but we [[were|eran/estaban]] all safe.

content.transcript: Last night there was a power cut at our house. My mother was in the kitchen. My father was in the living room. My brother was in his bedroom. It was very dark, but we were all safe.

content.stimulus_en: Last night there was a power cut at our house. My mother was in the kitchen. My father was in the living room. My brother was in his bedroom. It was very dark, but we [[were|eran/estaban]] all safe.
